latestVersion.verdictComment: "Someone shipped a grenade and forgot to pull the pin. 19 different subsystems on fire."

referencedIssues.title: [Bug]: Discord channel not loaded in 2026.5.4 (and beta.2/beta.3), works in beta.1 and 2026.4.29
[Bug]: WeChat plugin fails to start — api.runtime undefined in 2026.5.4 causes runtime initialization timeout
Discord delivery crashes with SyntaxError: Plugin/Core version mismatch (2026.5.4 plugin vs 2026.5.3 core)
[Bug]: openclaw-weixin plugin 2.4.1 incompatible with OpenClaw 2026.5.4 — channelRuntime API changes break inbound message processing
sqlite-vec import fails after upgrade to 2026.5.4 (regression from 5.3)
[Bug]: Matrix channel missing matrix-js-sdk after 2026.5.4 host npm update
[Bug]: Bundled fal image generation provider not registered in 2026.5.4 — plugin loads but image_generate reports 'No provider registered'
[Bug]: Telegram /verbose no longer streams thinking/tool progress into preview on 2026.5.4
[Bug] Feishu dispatch completes with replies=0 after upgrading to 2026.5.4 — replies not sent without streaming card
[Bug]: ReplyRunAlreadyActiveError still fires on 5.4 for discrete sequential chat.send (follow-up to #77485)
[Bug]: the bot frequently fails to reply to messages in Feishu group chats, while private messages work normally.When mentioned in the group, it shows the typing indicator after receiving the message
